evidence.source_title: The Genomics and Natural History of MRI-Visible vs MRI-Invisible Prostate Cancers: Clinical Implications.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 38865683. 2024/09/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: Various protocols exist for magnetic resonance arthrogram (MRA) of 
the shoulder, including 3D isotropic scanning and positioning in neutral (2D 
neutral MRA), or abduction-external-rotation (ABER).
HYPOTHESIS: MRA does not improve diagnostic accuracy for labral tears when 
compared to magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) performed using 3-Tesla (3T) 
magnets.
METHOD: Systematic review of the Cochrane, MEDLINE, and PubMed databases 
according to PRI
